<article id="post-31987" class="post-31987 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-news tag-bihar-news tag-news-in-hindi tag-patory-news tag-shahpur-patori infinite-scroll-item resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/shahpur-patori-civil-court-meeting.html" rel="bookmark">Shahpur Patori Civil Court लोक सुनवाई हंगामे बीच SIA घोषणा</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="updated" datetime="2026-02-22T13:43:02+05:30" itemprop="dateModified">22/02/2026</time><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2026-02-22T13:10:09+05:30" itemprop="datePublished">22/02/2026</time></span> <span class="byline">by <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.workervoice.in/author/worker-voice" title="View all posts by Worker Voice" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">Worker Voice</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/shahpur-patori-civil-court-meeting.html">
							<picture class="attachment-1536x1536 size-1536x1536 wp-post-image" itemprop="image" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high">
<source type="image/webp" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/shahpur-patori-civil-court.jpg.webp"/>
<img width="532" height="296" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20532%20296'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="shahpur patori civil court" itemprop="image" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" data-lazy-src="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/shahpur-patori-civil-court.jpg"/><noscript><img width="532" height="296" src="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/shahpur-patori-civil-court.jpg" alt="shahpur patori civil court" itemprop="image" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high"/></noscript>
</picture>

						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>Shahpur Patori Civil Court -पटोरी व्यववहार न्यायालय मालपुर में बनाने को लेकर कल 21 फरवरी 2026 को जोड़पुरा पंचायत भवन पर लोक सुनवाई का आयोजन किया गया था। जिला प्रशासन के तरफ से आहूत इस &#8230; <a title="Shahpur Patori Civil Court लोक सुनवाई हंगामे बीच SIA घोषणा" class="read-more" href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/shahpur-patori-civil-court-meeting.html" aria-label="Read more about Shahpur Patori Civil Court लोक सुनवाई हंगामे बीच SIA घोषणा">Read more</a></p>
			</div>

				<footer class="entry-meta" aria-label="Entry meta">

</article>
<article id="post-31931" class="post-31931 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-news tag-bihar-government tag-high-court-order tag-hindi-news tag-patory-news infinite-scroll-item resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/patori-civil-court-malpur-protest.html" rel="bookmark">Patori Civil Court मुख्यालय से दुर मालपुर में बनने की हकीकत</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="updated" datetime="2026-02-17T19:07:11+05:30" itemprop="dateModified">17/02/2026</time><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2026-02-17T12:25:27+05:30" itemprop="datePublished">17/02/2026</time></span> <span class="byline">by <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.workervoice.in/author/worker-voice" title="View all posts by Worker Voice" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">Worker Voice</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/patori-civil-court-malpur-protest.html">
							<img width="532" height="296" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20532%20296'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-1536x1536 size-1536x1536 wp-post-image" alt="Patori Civil Court" itemprop="image" decoding="async" data-lazy-src="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Patori-Civil-Court.jpg" /><noscript><img width="532" height="296" src="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Patori-Civil-Court.jpg" class="attachment-1536x1536 size-1536x1536 wp-post-image" alt="Patori Civil Court" itemprop="image" decoding="async" /></noscript>
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>Patori Civil Court &#8211; पटोरी अनुमंडल अंतर्गत बहुप्रतीक्षित व्यवहार न्यायालय बनने जा रहा है। जिसके निर्माण से पूर्व समर्थन की जगह चारो तरफ विरोध होना शुरू हो गया है। आज हम इस पोस्ट के माध्यम &#8230; <a title="Patori Civil Court मुख्यालय से दुर मालपुर में बनने की हकीकत" class="read-more" href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/patori-civil-court-malpur-protest.html" aria-label="Read more about Patori Civil Court मुख्यालय से दुर मालपुर में बनने की हकीकत">Read more</a></p>

			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>Contract Employees Regularisation &#8211; देश के लाखों कॉन्ट्रैक्ट कर्मचारी के पक्ष में माननीय सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने खुशखबरी दी है। जिसके तहत माननीय कोर्ट ने लंबे समय से काम कर रहे कॉन्ट्रैक्ट कर्मचारियों को रेगुलर करने &#8230; <a title="Contract Employees Regularisation सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने दी खुशखबरी" class="read-more" href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/contract-employees-regularisation.html" aria-label="Read more about Contract Employees Regularisation सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने दी खुशखबरी">Read more</a></p>

<article id="post-31733" class="post-31733 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-employees-news tag-da tag-employees-news tag-hindi-news tag-supreme-court-ka-faisla tag-west-bengal infinite-scroll-item resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>

				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/west-bengal-employees-supreme-court.html" rel="bookmark">West Bengal Employees Supreme Court सरकार को देना होगा DA</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="updated" datetime="2026-02-13T12:32:49+05:30" itemprop="dateModified">13/02/2026</time><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2026-02-07T16:29:05+05:30" itemprop="datePublished">07/02/2026</time></span> <span class="byline">by <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.workervoice.in/author/worker-voice" title="View all posts by Worker Voice" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">Worker Voice</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/west-bengal-employees-supreme-court.html">
							<img fetchpriority="high" width="538" height="299" src="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/West-Bengal-Employees-Supreme-Court.jpg" class="attachment-1536x1536 size-1536x1536 wp-post-image" alt="West Bengal Employees Supreme Court" itemprop="image" decoding="async" />
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>West Bengal Employees Supreme Court&#8211; सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने पश्चिम बंगाल के कर्मचारियों के लिए मंहगाई भत्ता जारी करने का महत्वपूर्ण आदेश दिया है। जिसके बाद सरकार को राज्य के 20 लाख कर्मचारियों को तकरीबन 41,000 &#8230; <a title="West Bengal Employees Supreme Court सरकार को देना होगा DA" class="read-more" href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/west-bengal-employees-supreme-court.html" aria-label="Read more about West Bengal Employees Supreme Court सरकार को देना होगा DA">Read more</a></p>
			</div>

<article id="post-31705" class="post-31705 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-news tag-modi-government tag-news-in-hindi tag-sahara-india tag-sahara-refund-portal infinite-scroll-item resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/sahara-india-refund-portal-update.html" rel="bookmark">Sahara India Refund Portal Update &#8211; संसद में राज्यवार ब्यौरा</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="updated" datetime="2026-02-10T22:58:45+05:30" itemprop="dateModified">10/02/2026</time><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2026-02-06T18:20:06+05:30" itemprop="datePublished">06/02/2026</time></span> <span class="byline">by <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.workervoice.in/author/worker-voice" title="View all posts by Worker Voice" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">Worker Voice</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/sahara-india-refund-portal-update.html">
							<picture class="attachment-1536x1536 size-1536x1536 wp-post-image" itemprop="image" decoding="async">
<source type="image/webp" srcset="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Sahara-India-Refund-Portal-Update.jpg.webp"/>
<img width="538" height="299" src="https://www.workervoice.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Sahara-India-Refund-Portal-Update.jpg" alt="Sahara India Refund Portal Update" itemprop="image" decoding="async"/>
</picture>

						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>Sahara India Refund Portal Update &#8211; सहारा इंडिया में पैसा फंसा है तो आपके लिए महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी लेकर आये हैं। सहारा रिफंड को लेकर एक बार फिर से संसद में मामला उठा है। जिसमें मोदी &#8230; <a title="Sahara India Refund Portal Update &#8211; संसद में राज्यवार ब्यौरा" class="read-more" href="https://www.workervoice.in/2026/02/sahara-india-refund-portal-update.html" aria-label="Read more about Sahara India Refund Portal Update &#8211; संसद में राज्यवार ब्यौरा">Read more</a></p>
